title: Director / Proprietor
responsibilities: Set company quality, environmental and OHS policy and objectives
Ensure availability of resources for QMS, EMS and OH&S implementation
Review management review meeting outcomes and approve action plans
Approve capital expenditure, new customer contracts and supplier empanelment
Overall accountability for regulatory compliance and certification maintenance

kras.area: ISO certification maintained without major NC
kras.target: Zero major NCs per audit cycle

dwm_review_duties: Weekly: Review production output and dispatch summary
Monthly: Chair Management Review Meeting; review KPI dashboard
Monthly: Review customer complaint status and CAPA closure

title: Management Representative (MR) / Quality Manager
responsibilities: Maintain and continually improve the Integrated Management System (IMS) for ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001
Plan and conduct internal audits; track CAPA closure
Coordinate external certification audits and liaise with certification body
Prepare and present MRM agenda, minutes and KPI report to Director
Ensure document control: issue, revision, obsolescence of all IMS documents

kras.area: Zero major NCs in external surveillance audit

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Review quality rejection log and customer feedback inbox
Weekly: Review open NCRs and CAPA status; follow up with process owners
Monthly: Compile KPI data for MRM; update document master list
min_qualification: B.E. / Diploma in Mechanical, Plastics or Production Engineering; Lead Auditor certification preferred

title: Production Supervisor
responsibilities: Plan daily production schedule based on orders and raw material availability
Monitor blow moulding machine parameters (temperature, pressure, cycle time) and ensure conformance
Supervise machine operators and enforce safe work practices
Coordinate mould changeovers and first-article approval with Quality Inspector
Record production data (output, scrap, downtime) in daily production log

kras.target: ≤ [TO BE ENTERED]% of total production weight

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Review production log, machine parameter sheets and operator attendance
Daily: Conduct toolbox talk before shift start
Weekly: Review scrap trend and maintenance work orders; report to MR and Director
min_qualification: Diploma in Mechanical / Plastics Technology; minimum 3 years in blow moulding or injection moulding

title: Quality Inspector (IQC / In-Process / OQC)
responsibilities: Perform incoming quality checks on HDPE resin and masterbatch per approved sampling plan
Conduct in-process inspection of blow moulded bottles/cans (dimensions, weight, visual, leak test)
Perform outgoing quality check before dispatch and affix OK / HOLD / REJECT status tag
Maintain inspection records, control charts and calibration schedule for gauges
Raise Non-Conformance Reports (NCRs) and trigger CAPA process for recurring defects

kras.area: In-process defect detection rate (caught before OQC)

kras.target: [TO BE ENTERED]% gauges calibrated on time

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Complete IQC, in-process and OQC inspection log; update defect tally
Weekly: Review defect Pareto with Production Supervisor; identify top-3 defect types
Monthly: Submit inspection summary and gauge calibration status to MR
min_qualification: Diploma / B.Sc. in Science or Engineering; experience in plastics quality inspection

title: Machine Operator (Blow Moulding)
responsibilities: Operate HDPE blow moulding machines as per Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
Set and monitor process parameters (barrel temperature zones, blow pressure, cooling time) as specified
Perform hourly self-inspection of output (visual, weight check) and segregate rejects
Carry out machine cleaning, lubrication and first-level preventive maintenance tasks
Report abnormalities (flash, short shot, contamination, machine fault) to Production Supervisor immediately

kras.target: ≥ [TO BE ENTERED]% of shift rejects self-caught

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Complete machine parameter log sheet every 2 hours
Daily: Record self-inspection results in operator quality checklist
Weekly: Participate in toolbox talk and 5S audit of workstation
min_qualification: ITI (Plastics / Fitter / Mechanic) or Class 10 pass with 1 year blow moulding on-the-job experience

title: Store & Dispatch Executive
responsibilities: Receive incoming raw materials (HDPE resin, masterbatch, labels, corrugated boxes) and record in GRN
Maintain FIFO stock rotation and update inventory register daily
Issue materials to production against approved material requisition
Pack finished goods, apply batch label and prepare dispatch documentation (invoice, e-way bill, delivery challan)
Coordinate with transporters and update dispatch log; communicate ETA to customers

kras.target: ≥ [TO BE ENTERED]% match on monthly count
[TO BE ENTERED]% lots dispatched in correct FIFO sequence

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Update stock register for RM receipts and issues; print daily dispatch plan
Weekly: Reconcile physical stock of resin, labels and boxes with ledger; report variance to MR
Monthly: Submit inventory consumption report; flag slow-moving or near-expiry stock
min_qualification: HSC / Graduate; basic computer skills (Excel / ERP); experience in warehouse operations

title: EHS Officer (Environment, Health & Safety)
responsibilities: Identify and assess occupational hazards and environmental aspects in blow moulding operations
Implement and monitor legal compliance register (MPCB consent, factory act, MSIHC rules)
Conduct safety induction for new employees and periodic toolbox talks
Maintain records of accidents, near-misses and environmental incidents; lead investigation and corrective action
Coordinate disposal of plastic scrap, regrind and hazardous waste (lubricants, coolant) per consent conditions

kras.area: Legal compliance observations closed on time

kras.target: ≥ [TO BE ENTERED] near-misses reported per month (leading indicator)

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Walk-through inspection of plant for unsafe acts/conditions; update hazard register
Weekly: Review near-miss and incident log; conduct one toolbox talk
Monthly: Compile EHS KPI report (LTIFR, incidents, waste disposal records) for MRM
min_qualification: Diploma / Degree in Fire & Safety / Industrial Safety or equivalent; NEBOSH / IOSH preferred

title: HR & Admin Executive
responsibilities: Maintain employee records, attendance and leave management
Coordinate recruitment, on-boarding formalities and statutory compliance (PF, ESIC, PT)
Identify training needs in coordination with MR; schedule and record training sessions
Handle general administration: housekeeping contracts, canteen, office supplies, vehicle
Support MR in maintaining personnel competence matrix and training effectiveness records

kras.target: [TO BE ENTERED]% of planned training sessions conducted on schedule

dwm_review_duties: Daily: Update attendance register and resolve absenteeism with Production Supervisor
Weekly: Check pending training records and follow up with department heads
Monthly: Submit HR metrics (headcount, attrition, training hours) to Director; process payroll inputs
min_qualification: Graduate in HR / Commerce; working knowledge of PF, ESIC and Factories Act
